narration_text: Now we'll see how all these concepts fit together, let's think about this together, considering the network as a whole. Notice that the internet has a core and an edge, with physical media connecting them. I want you to focus on the image on the slide, it illustrates the internet structure, look at the diagram on your slide — notice how the hosts and access networks are positioned at the edge, while the core is made up of packet and circuit switches. This visual representation should help you understand the relationships between these components. As we move forward, we'll delve deeper into each of these areas, and this diagram will serve as a reference point.
